name: shibanshu-markdown-viewer
description: A native macOS Markdown viewer and editor with secure live preview, direct file opening, and local exports.
author: Shibanshu Jha

scripts.build: npm run validate:syntax && npm run assets:icon && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --mac dir && node scripts/sign-dev-mac.mjs
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npm run validate:syntax && npm run assets:icon && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --mac dir --arm64 && node scripts/sign-dev-mac.mjs --arch arm64 && npm run package:mac:zip -- --arch arm64 && npm run release:checksums && npm run verify:mac:app -- --arch arm64 && npm run release:readiness -- --arch arm64 && npm run generate:download-page
scripts.dist:mac:x64: npm run validate:syntax && npm run assets:icon && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --mac dir --x64 && node scripts/sign-dev-mac.mjs --arch x64 && npm run package:mac:zip -- --arch x64 && npm run release:checksums && npm run verify:mac:app -- --arch x64 && npm run release:readiness -- --arch x64 && npm run generate:download-page
scripts.dist:mac:universal: npm run validate:syntax && npm run assets:icon && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --mac dir --universal && node scripts/sign-dev-mac.mjs --arch universal && npm run package:mac:zip -- --arch universal && npm run release:checksums && npm run verify:mac:app -- --arch universal && npm run release:readiness -- --arch universal && npm run generate:download-page
scripts.dist:mac:dmg:arm64: npm run validate:syntax && npm run assets:icon && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --mac dmg --arm64 && npm run release:checksums && npm run generate:download-page
scripts.dist:win: npm run validate:syntax && npm run assets:icon && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --win nsis portable
scripts.dist:linux: npm run validate:syntax && npm run assets:icon && npm run build:renderer && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb rpm
scripts.stress: npm run assets:icon && npm run build:renderer && node scripts/stress-check.mjs
scripts.check: npm run validate:syntax && npm run assets:icon && npm run build:renderer && node scripts/smoke-check.mjs
scripts.build:android: npm run build:renderer && npx cap sync android
scripts.dist:android:apk: npm run build:android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && echo 'APK built at android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk'

extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: Shibanshu Markdown Viewer does not use camera access.
extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Shibanshu Markdown Viewer does not use microphone access.
extendInfo.NSAudioCaptureUsageDescription: Shibanshu Markdown Viewer does not use audio capture.
extendInfo.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Shibanshu Markdown Viewer does not use Bluetooth access.
extendInfo.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: Shibanshu Markdown Viewer does not use Bluetooth access.
